airfare.basis: Airfare is reimbursable up to 1200 USD for approved business travel.

lodging.basis: Lodging is reimbursable up to 250 USD per night.

meals.basis: Meals are reimbursable up to 75 USD per day.

taxi.basis: Ground transport is reimbursable up to 120 USD per trip.

conference.basis: Conference fees are reimbursable up to 800 USD with a business purpose.

entertainment.basis: Entertainment expenses are excluded from reimbursement.
